text.title: funnel-basics-examples Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for funnel-basics-examples as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Optimizing steps that already meet "great" benchmarks while ignoring steps below "good."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Effort spent on a step at 80% conversion (already great) produces less gain than fixing a step at 20% conversion (well below good). Always benchmark first.
